svg.text: Reusable modules • Multi-environment (Dev / QA / Prod) • Azure DevOps CI/CD • OIDC Authentication
Build Sample App (Maven → JAR + Procfile → ZIP)
Example: myapp-dev.us-east-1.elasticbeanstalk.com • Configured via eb_environment_cname_prefix variable
DNS Support + DNS Hostnames enabled • 2 Availability Zones
EB Web Tier + Worker + S3 policies
Ingress: TCP/80 from ALB SG only
EB Web Tier + Worker + S3 policies
Ingress: TCP/80 from ALB SG only
All alarms → SNS → Email subscription (optional) • Create new or use existing topic
